# El-Shaddai Orphanage Foundation

## Overview
El-Shaddai Orphanage Foundation is a non-governmental organization (NGO) located in Usuk sub-county, Katakwi District in Eastern Uganda. Our head office is in Wakiso District, Nansana Municipality. 

## Mission
Our mission is to restore radical hope to orphans, vulnerable children, young widows, and teenage mothers throughout Usuk sub-county through holistic care, education, and health rehabilitation. Our guiding principle is: Love God. Love people. Serve others.

## Core Competencies
We focus on 6 core competencies for our beneficiaries:
1. Emotional Healing
2. Academic Excellence
3. Vocational Skills
4. Spiritual Growth
5. Social Integration
6. Economic Empowerment

## Impact & Accountability
* 300+ vulnerable children provided with critical healthcare.
* 200+ families and widows empowered through sustainable farming.
* 150+ education sponsorships awarded.
* Grassroots networks active in 5+ counties.
* 100% of contributions go directly to field initiatives.

## Contact Information
* Website: https://www.el-shaddaifoundation.org/
* Phone/Hotline: +256 774 538 481
* Field Base: Usuk Sub-County, Katakwi District, Eastern Uganda
